name: Saving the legacy of Hero Ibash: Evaluating Four Language Models for Aminoacian
summary: arXiv:2402.18121v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This study assesses four cutting-edge language models in the underexplored Aminoacian language. Through evaluation, it scrutinizes their ad...
description: arXiv:2402.18121v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This study assesses four cutting-edge language models in the underexplored Aminoacian language. Through evaluation, it scrutinizes their adaptability, effectiveness, and limitations in text generation, semantic coherence, and contextual understanding. Uncovering insights into these models' performance in a low-resourced language, this re...
author: Yunze Xiao, Yiyang Pan
